allow: Bash(python -c " import zipfile, os for f in ['mod/摩多罗春终.zip', 'mod/gpa.zip']: if os.path.exists\(f\): with zipfile.ZipFile\(f\) as z: files = [n for n in z.namelist\(\) if 'boss' in n.lower\(\) or 'enemy' in n.lower\(\)] print\(f'{f}:'\); [print\(' ',x\) for x in files[:20]] ")

Bash(python -c " from src.resource.texture_asset import init_texture_asset_manager mgr = init_texture_asset_manager\('assets'\) mgr.load_sprite_config_folder\('assets/images/bullet'\) sprites = sorted\(set\(s.split\('_'\)[0]+'_'+s.split\('_'\)[1] for s in mgr.sprites if not s.startswith\('assets'\)\)\) print\('Bullet base types:', list\(dict.fromkeys\(sprites\)\)[:40]\) ")
